title: Gabriel Makhlouf: Opening remarks - "10th Annual Macroprudential Conference"
body:
Opening remarks by Mr Gabriel Makhlouf, Governor of the Central Bank of Ireland, at the 10th Annual Macroprudential Conference, jointly organised with the Deutsche Bundesbank, the Nederlandsche Bank, and the Sveriges Riksbank, Dublin, 22 June 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260630f.htm

title: Joachim Nagel: The digital euro - promoting innovation, safeguarding sovereignty, strengthening Europe
body:
Speech by Dr Joachim Nagel, President of the Deutsche Bundesbank, at the International Bankers Forum, Frankfurt am Main, 24 June 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260630e.htm

title: Christine Lagarde: Hearing of the Committee on Economic and Monetary Affairs of the European Parliament
body:
Speech by Ms Christine Lagarde, President of the European Central Bank, at the Hearing of the Committee on Economic and Monetary Affairs of the European Parliament, Brussels, 22 June 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260625a.htm

title: Steven Maijoor: Lessons from 1763 - the central bank as lender of last resort
body:
Speech by Mr Steven Maijoor, Executive Board Member and Chair of Supervision of De Nederlandsche Bank, at a meeting of the European Central Bank's Market Operations Committee, Amsterdam, 18 June 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260624e.htm
